actr.license: Architecture/runtime audit only; no adoption attempt here.
limitations: theory/pattern source, not a direct plug-in resolver for our repo
does not provide the typed cross-mechanism authority seam by itself
actr.name: ACT-R
actr.requires_python: Not audited as a Python package for this stage.

bayesian_er_public_code.activity_status: Useful audit reference, but not the preferred near-term integration substrate.
limitations: ecosystem mismatch for the current Python-only audit seam
heavier runtime and licensing trade-offs than Splink/dedupe

local_smoke.reason: Not a thin Python drop-in for the current repo contracts.

bayesian_er_public_code.name: dblink / exchanger family
bayesian_er_public_code.requires_python: Not primary Python-first path; Spark/Scala or R ecosystems dominate.

coala.activity_status: Useful architectural taxonomy, not a closed implementation.
limitations: taxonomy rather than a ready-made resolver or tracker
does not remove the need to evaluate ordinary blocking/routing baselines
coala.name: CoALA

dedupe.activity_status: Mature, widely used Python ER library with long commit history and maintained docs.
dedupe.name: dedupe

soar.activity_status: Long-lived architecture with tutorials and manuals.
soar.license: Architecture/runtime audit only; full integration not pursued here.
limitations: whole-architecture adoption is much broader than the Level 2B seam
does not directly solve our Python-side authority/routing contract
soar.name: Soar
soar.requires_python: Not audited as a Python package for this stage.

splink.activity_status: Active open-source project with documented releases and substantial community usage.
limitations: tabular structured-record matcher rather than temporal tracker
no built-in downstream action authority layer
splink.name: Splink

stonesoup.activity_status: Active tracking framework with examples, tutorials, and recent release history.
limitations: tracking-centric abstractions rather than canonical gazetteer matching
stonesoup.name: Stone Soup
